Override.dn: Tattoo of the Kitava Blood Drinker

Overrides.Override: 0.5% of Attack Damage Leeched as Life
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Indigon Hubris Circlet Energy Shield: 257 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 0.2509 Unique ID: 3fc565b6d571715cf2453161db5e909c482cc7b2bfb17cc80843ca1ed4076f8b Shaper Item Elder Item Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-B-R-B LevelReq: 69 Implicits: 0 158% increased Energy Shield 10% increased maximum Mana Recover 8% of Life when you use a Mana Flask Non-instant Mana Recovery from Flasks is also Recovered as Life 51% increased Cost of Skills for each 200 total Mana Spent Recently 24% increased Spell Damage for each 200 total Mana you have Spent Recently, up to 2000%
